herbs.herb_desc: Aesculus hippocastanum, also known as horse chestnut extract, is a popular ingredient in skincare products due to its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. When formulated into a lotion, it may help soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and promoting a more even complexion. Aesculus hippocastanum lotion is often used to address issues such as eczema, rosacea, and other skin conditions, providing long-lasting hydration and comfort.
